prompt: Close-up portrait of a woman gazing directly into the camera. Most of her face and neck are swallowed in deep shadow. A single thin horizontal band of light cuts across her features, revealing only her eyes and the bridge of her nose. She has a sharp, defined jawline and short textured hair, wearing a plain black shirt. The background is a flat, overcast gray-blue sky. High-contrast shadow-heavy lighting gives the frame a tense, cinematic atmosphere.
